narrative:
Dayton 11-D (precinct in Montgomery County) has 980 registered voters, with 68.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.3 percentage points.
